intended_use: SIS Software is an application intended for use in the viewing, presentation and documentation of medical imaging, including different modules for image processing, image fusion, and intraoperative fu
intended_use_full: SIS Software is an application intended for use in the viewing, presentation and documentation of medical imaging, including different modules for image processing, image fusion, and intraoperative functional planning where the 3D output can be used with stereotactic image guided surgery or other devices for further processing and visualization. The device can be used in conjunction with other clinical methods as an aid in visualization of the subthalamic nuclei (STN).
target_condition: Subthalamic nucleus (STN) visualization for stereotactic neurosurgery
ground_truth: Manually segmented clinical images and 7T MRI images superimposed for STN visualization; expert manual segmentation (2 experts) for electrode segmentation validation using 3D STL components
other_metrics: Center of mass distance: 90% below 1.66mm (95% CI: 79.5–96.2%), 98.3% not greater than 2.0mm (95% CI: 91–100%); Surface distance: 100% not greater than 2.0mm (95% CI: 94–100%); Dice coefficient: 0.69; Co-registration tolerance: 95% confidence that 90% of registrations will have reference point distances below 0.454mm; Segmentation COM distance: 95% confidence that 90% will be below 0.491mm; Segmentation orientation difference: 95% confidence that 90% will be below 2.486 degrees
